State.ArmyThreshold: Threshold exceeded — resolve at round end

Horizon.Title: Conflict horizon
Horizon.Projection: Projection using the current order and participants

Event.ActivateNowConfirm: The beginning of that round has already passed. Activate the event now?

Template.SelectPack: Select a writable world JournalEntry pack first.
Template.NoWritablePack: No writable JournalEntry pack is available. Create a world compendium from the Compendium sidebar, then reopen this window.

Participant.Title: Add Participant
Participant.PreferSceneToken: Use an existing token on the viewed scene when available
Participant.DropHint: You can also drop an Actor or Token document here.
Participant.ActorOnlyConfirm: An actor-only combatant cannot use grid movement or range bands. Continue?
Participant.LateArrivalNotice: This combat has started. The system late-arrival service will enforce the appropriate L5R5e timing and initiative test.

Withdraw.Title: Withdraw from Conflict
Withdraw.Confirm: Remove {name} from this conflict? In a mass battle, first resolve any honor, glory, or panic consequences required by the rules.

Profile.Title: Descriptive state profiles
Profile.Intro: Configure zero to four active states per resource. Active bounds must increase and end at 100%. Exact values remain visible only to a GM or the actor's OWNER.

Error.tooManyActive: A profile may have at most four active states.
Error.invalidBound: Every bound must be a number from 0 to 100.
Error.boundsNotIncreasing: Active bounds must be strictly increasing without duplicates.
Error.missingLabel: Every state needs an English or Polish label.
Error.mustEndAt100: The last active state must end at 100%.

Profiles.Name: Descriptive state profiles
Profiles.Label: Configure profiles
Profiles.Hint: Configure privacy-safe Fatigue, Strife, Strength, and Discipline labels.

InformationPolicy.Name: Non-owner resource information
InformationPolicy.Hint: What users without OWNER permission receive.

AutoRemoveMinions.Name: Remove defeated minions
AutoRemoveMinions.Hint: The authoritative GM removes defeated minions from Combat.

HideFirstRound.Name: Hide enemies until their first turn
HideFirstRound.Hint: Off by default. Filters only this dock and never patches Combatant visibility.

HideEnemyInitiative.Name: Hide enemy initiative
HideEnemyInitiative.Hint: Off by default. Masks only this dock's value.

EffectDescriptions.Name: Show effect descriptions
EffectDescriptions.Hint: Descriptions are only prepared for a GM or OWNER.

EventChat.Name: Post triggered events to chat
EventChat.Hint: Create a safe public chat card when a public event activates.

Placement.Name: Dock placement
Placement.Hint: Attach to the screen edge or use a floating window.

DockEdge.Name: Docked screen edge
DockEdge.Hint: Place the dock at the top or bottom of the screen.

Overflow.Name: Overflow
Overflow.Hint: Choose how crowded portrait lists behave.

FutureRounds.Name: Future rounds
FutureRounds.Hint: Number of future rounds shown in the horizon (1–10).

Disposition.Name: Disposition colors
Disposition.Hint: Use Foundry disposition colors on portrait borders.

HideUi.Name: Hide conflicting top UI
HideUi.Hint: Fade the top UI while the dock is visible.

Error.WrongSystem: L5R5e Combat Tracker Dock requires the l5r5e system.
Error.OldSystem: L5R5e Combat Tracker Dock requires l5r5e {version} or newer.
Error.MissingApi: The required L5R5e public API is unavailable: {api}.
Error.LateArrivalApi: This running combat requires game.l5r5e.lateArrivals. Update the L5R5e system.
Error.InvalidTemplate: The dropped JournalEntry is not a compatible event template.
Error.PackNotWritable: The selected JournalEntry compendium is not writable.
